stemHtml: Which of the following correctly describes unusable fuel?

options.a: Fuel which is only able to be used on the ground.
options.b: Final reserve fuel that is only allowed to be used during an emergency.
options.c: Fuel in the tank that is not able to be used by the engines on the ground or in flight.
options.d: The amount of fuel not available for use but still included on the fuel contents gauge.
